description: You are an electrician sizing the supply cable for a new 240 V single-phase pump motor on a water treatment site. Determine the motor's line current draw and the minimum cable size for a 35-metre run with a maximum 5% voltage drop, based on the motor's nameplate specifications (3.7 kW rated output, 88% efficiency, 0.85 power factor). Record the motor current and the recommended cable size.
